instruction: take the green object off of the scales tray
planner_code:
objects = ['scale', 'green pepper', 'red pepper', 'yellow pepper']
# Query: take the green object off of the scales tray.
composer("grasp the green pepper")
composer("back to default pose")
composer("move to the table top")
composer("open gripper")
composer("back to default pose")
# done

affordance_maps.query: a point at the center of the green pepper.
affordance_maps.code:
affordance_map = get_empty_affordance_map()
green_pepper = parse_query_obj('green pepper')
x, y, z = green_pepper.position
affordance_map[x, y, z] = 1
ret_val = affordance_map

affordance_maps.query: a point on the table top.
affordance_maps.code:
affordance_map = get_empty_affordance_map()
table = parse_query_obj('table')
(min_x, min_y, min_z), (max_x, max_y, max_z) = table.aabb
center_x, center_y, center_z = table.position
# on the table top so z = max_z
x = center_x
y = center_y
z = max_z
affordance_map[x, y, z] = 1
ret_val = affordance_map

instruction: put the green item on the item
planner_code:
objects = ['scale', 'green pepper', 'red pepper', 'yellow pepper']
# Query: put the green item on the item.
composer("grasp the green pepper")
composer("back to default pose")
composer("move to the top of the scale")
composer("open gripper")
composer("back to default pose")
# done

affordance_maps.query: a point at the center of the green pepper.
affordance_maps.code:
affordance_map = get_empty_affordance_map()
green_pepper = parse_query_obj('green pepper')
x, y, z = green_pepper.position
affordance_map[x, y, z] = 1
ret_val = affordance_map

affordance_maps.query: a point 10cm above the scale.
affordance_maps.code:
affordance_map = get_empty_affordance_map()
scale = parse_query_obj('scale')
(min_x, min_y, min_z), (max_x, max_y, max_z) = scale.aabb
center_x, center_y, center_z = scale.position
# 10cm above so we add to z-axis
x = center_x
y = center_y
z = max_z + cm2index(10, 'z')
affordance_map[x, y, z] = 1
ret_val = affordance_map

composer("close the gripper")
composer("back to default pose")

affordance_maps.query: a point at the center of the button.
affordance_maps.code:
affordance_map = get_empty_affordance_map()
button = parse_query_obj('button')
x, y, z = button.position
affordance_map[x, y, z] = 1
ret_val = affordance_map

instruction: push down the yellow button
planner_code:
objects = ['button']
# Query: push down the yellow button.
composer("move to the center of the button")
composer("push down by 5cm")
composer("back to default pose")
# done

affordance_maps.query: a point at the center of the button.
affordance_maps.code:
affordance_map = get_empty_affordance_map()
button = parse_query_obj('button')
x, y, z = button.position
affordance_map[x, y, z] = 1
ret_val = affordance_map

affordance_maps.query: a point 5cm below the current position.
affordance_maps.code:
affordance_map = get_empty_affordance_map()
current_position = parse_query_obj('current position')
# 5cm below so we subtract from z-axis
x = current_position[0]
y = current_position[1]
z = current_position[2] - cm2index(5, 'z')
affordance_map[x, y, z] = 1
ret_val = affordance_map

instruction: push the maroon button
planner_code:
objects = ['button']
# Query: push the maroon button.
composer("move to the center of the button")
composer("push the button by 5cm")
composer("back to default pose")
# done

affordance_maps.query: a point at the center of the button.
affordance_maps.code:
affordance_map = get_empty_affordance_map()
button = parse_query_obj('button')
x, y, z = button.position
affordance_map[x, y, z] = 1
ret_val = affordance_map

affordance_maps.query: a point 5cm into the button.
affordance_maps.code:
affordance_map = get_empty_affordance_map()
button = parse_query_obj('button')
# negative normal because we are moving into the button.
moving_dir = -button.normal
affordance_xyz = button.position + cm2index(5, moving_dir)
affordance_map[affordance_xyz[0], affordance_xyz[1], affordance_xyz[2]] = 1
ret_val = affordance_map

instruction: throw away the trash, leaving any other objects alone
planner_code:
objects = ['bin', 'rubbish', 'tomato1', 'tomato2']
# Query: throw away the trash, leaving any other objects alone.
composer("grasp the rubbish")
composer("back to default pose")
composer("move to the top of the bin")
composer("open gripper")
composer("back to default pose")
# done

affordance_maps.query: a point at the center of the rubbish.
affordance_maps.code:
affordance_map = get_empty_affordance_map()
rubbish = parse_query_obj('rubbish')
x, y, z = rubbish.position
affordance_map[x, y, z] = 1
ret_val = affordance_map

affordance_maps.query: a point 10cm above the bin.
affordance_maps.code:
affordance_map = get_empty_affordance_map()
bin = parse_query_obj('bin')
(min_x, min_y, min_z), (max_x, max_y, max_z) = bin.aabb
center_x, center_y, center_z = bin.position
# 10cm above so we add to z-axis
x = center_x
y = center_y
z = max_z + cm2index(10, 'z')
affordance_map[x, y, z] = 1
ret_val = affordance_map
